nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Galápagos shearwater
nodes.summary: The Galápagos shearwater (Puffinus subalaris) is a small shearwater. Until recently it was considered to be a subspecies of Audubon's shearwater, but it is actually one of two members of a very ancient lineage of the small Puffinus species, the other being, as indicated by mtDNA cytochrome b sequence data, the Christmas shearwater. It is an endemic breeder of the Galápagos Islands, and is largely sedentary, although individuals are commonly seen as far as the Oaxacan coast of Mexico. Description The Galápagos shearwater has dark brown upperparts, undertail and underwing flight feathers, the rest of the underparts plumage being white. It sometimes has a dark collar. Both sexes are alike, as are the young after fledging. It is a slender-bodied shearwater, about 29–31 cm long, with a wingspan of around 63 cm and weighs 123-225 g. The species closely resembles the tropical shearwater, although the latter is typically blacker and has a longer tail. Behaviour The Galápagos shearwater is a gregarious species and will feed at sea with other shearwaters and boobies. It flies low over the water and feeds on squid, fish and offal. It intersperses 4-10 stiff wing beats with shallow glides. References External links Galapagos shearwater photos

nodes.name: 加岛鹱
nodes.summary: 加岛鹱（Puffinus subalaris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Galápagos shearwater。

nodes.name: 鹱形目
nodes.summary: 鹱形目（Procellariiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联115种鸟类，如加岛信天翁、短尾信天翁、Northern royal albatross等115种鸟类。

nodes.name: 剪水鹱属
nodes.summary: 剪水鹱属（Puffinus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联19种鸟类，如Christmas shearwater、Galápagos shearwater、Fluttering shearwater等19种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鹱科
nodes.summary: 鹱科（Procellariidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联74种鸟类，如南极鹱、Pintado petrel、Southern giant petrel等74种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。
